response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate due to his extensive experience building a geospatial data platform (GISCollective) and working on high-performance, low-latency distributed systems. This background aligns well with the core responsibilities of building and optimizing a routing data pipeline. While his professional C++ experience is not recent, his deep expertise in DLang, a similar systems programming language, suggests he could quickly become proficient in C++ or Rust. His seniority and demonstrated passion for the geospatial domain make him a compelling candidate worth interviewing to assess the language gap.
strengths: Deep, hands-on experience in geospatial data through founding and developing the GISCollective platform.
Proven ability to build and maintain high-performance, low-latency distributed systems handling massive traffic.
Extensive systems programming experience with DLang, demonstrating skills transferable to C++/Rust.
concerns: Primary language requirement is C++ or Rust; the candidate's recent and deep experience is in DLang and TypeScript.
Professional C++ experience at National Instruments is brief and dates back to 2015.
Geospatial experience seems focused on data collection and mapping, not specifically on routing, tiling, or navigation pipelines.
